retrieved_result: Which is an ecosystem that is technically considered to be a desert? William Howe 565,038 Contributions The purpose of life is to have a life with purpose. Answered In Ecosystems Which is an ecosystem that is technically considered to be a desert? A desert is defined as a region that receives less than 10 inches (250 mm) of rain per year on average. Answered In Sahar
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses deserts and ecosystems, not easy DIY room decoration ideas.
